craft.description: Shape and build a Flutter mobile/native screen, widget, or flow end-to-end. Uses project ThemeData, routing, state management, Semantics, adaptive layout, and tests. Use when building Flutter UI, Dart widgets, app flows, or feature screens.

shape.description: Plan Flutter UX/UI before writing Dart. Defines user goal, widget structure, state model, adaptive layout, theme usage, accessibility risks, and verification steps. Use before implementing a Flutter screen or flow.

teach.description: Gather product and design context for a Flutter project. Writes PRODUCT.md and optionally DESIGN.md so future commands understand users, register, brand, ThemeData, ColorScheme, TextTheme, and app patterns.

document.description: Generate DESIGN.md from a Flutter project by extracting ThemeData, ColorScheme, TextTheme, ThemeExtension, pubspec fonts and assets, component themes, and reusable widgets.

extract.description: Consolidate repeated Flutter widgets, ThemeData values, ColorScheme roles, TextTheme styles, and component themes into a reusable design system.

critique.description: Review a Flutter screen or flow from a UX design perspective using screenshots, Dart source, ThemeData, platform conventions, accessibility, cognitive load, and generated-app anti-patterns.

audit.description: Run Flutter technical quality checks across Semantics, accessibility, performance, theming, adaptive layout, localization, resilience, and tests. Produces a scored report with P0-P3 findings.

polish.description: Perform a final Flutter UI quality pass for alignment, spacing, TextTheme consistency, interactive states, Semantics, text scaling, light/dark theme, and code cleanliness.

adapt.description: Adapt Flutter UI across mobile devices, tablet widths, orientation, keyboard insets, SafeArea, text scaling, RTL, and native platform expectations using MediaQuery and LayoutBuilder.

harden.description: Make Flutter UI production-ready for real data, text overflow, i18n, RTL, offline states, permissions, app lifecycle, deep links, keyboard overlap, and interrupted flows.

optimize.description: Diagnose and improve Flutter UI performance including rebuild scope, const widgets, list builders, slivers, image decode, shader jank, animation cost, and DevTools frame issues.

clarify.description: Improve Flutter UX copy, localized labels, form errors, empty states, SnackBars, dialogs, tooltips, and Semantics labels.

typeset.description: Improve Flutter typography through TextTheme roles, font assets, hierarchy, readability, text scaling, and localization-safe labels.

colorize.description: Improve Flutter color through ColorScheme, ThemeExtension, semantic state colors, light/dark contrast, and reduced hard-coded Color usage.

layout.description: Fix Flutter layout, constraints, spacing, scroll structure, SafeArea, keyboard behavior, thumb reach, and hierarchy.

animate.description: Add purposeful Flutter motion using AnimatedSwitcher, implicit animations, Hero, AnimationController, and performance-aware transitions.

onboard.description: Design Flutter onboarding, first-run flows, permission education, empty states, activation moments, and resumable setup flows.
